The Equalizer 2 (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $102,084,362Details
International Box Office $88,291,819
Worldwide Box Office $190,376,181
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,211,209
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $12,963,330
Total $26,174,539
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Robert McCall serves an unflinching justice for the exploited and oppressed—but how far will he go when that is someone he loves?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$36,011,640 (35.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$77,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,388 opening theaters/3,388 max. theaters, 5.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $134,020,746

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 20th, 2018 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: July 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Trinidad)
July 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Jamaica)
July 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Iceland)
July 19th, 2018 (Wide), released as The Equalizer 2 - A Vingança (Portugal)
July 19th, 2018 (Wide) (Curacao)
Video Release: November 13th, 2018 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for brutal violence throughout, language, and some drug content.
(Rating bulletin 2534 (Cert #51432), 7/4/2018)
Running Time: 129 minutes
Franchise: The Equalizer
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Betrayal, Death of a Best Friend, Hitmen, Revenge, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Escape Artists, Zhiv, Mace Neufeld
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
